name: @inferlane/mcp
description: The AI agent's cost intelligence layer. Model selection, spend tracking, credibility scoring, local-to-cloud routing, and platform integration via MCP.

npx.description: Run directly via npx without installation

authentication.description: API key is optional. 22 tools work fully offline with no key — cost intelligence, credibility, local routing, model selection, ratings, real-time monitoring. 4 additional tools (check_promotions, platform_spend, platform_budget, route_via_platform) require an API key for platform connectivity.

tools.name: pick_model
tools.description: Choose the optimal AI model for a task considering cost, quality, and speed.

tools.name: log_request
tools.description: Track API request costs in the current session.

tools.name: session_cost
tools.description: Get current session cost summary.

tools.name: rate_recommendation
tools.description: Rate a model recommendation for continuous improvement.

tools.name: model_ratings
tools.description: View aggregated model ratings leaderboard.

tools.name: improvement_cycle
tools.description: Run continuous improvement analysis on model recommendations.

tools.name: integrity_report
tools.description: Get rating integrity validation report.

tools.name: credibility_profile
tools.description: View agent credibility score and breakdown.

tools.name: credibility_leaderboard
tools.description: View agent credibility leaderboard.

tools.name: route_to_cloud
tools.description: Record a local-to-cloud routing decision for credibility scoring.

tools.name: assess_routing
tools.description: Get local vs cloud routing recommendation for a task.

tools.name: cluster_status
tools.description: Detect and report local inference endpoints (Ollama, vLLM, etc).

tools.name: get_spend_summary
tools.description: Get offline spend summary by period.

tools.name: get_budget_status
tools.description: Get budget tracking status.

tools.name: get_model_pricing
tools.description: Look up model pricing data.

tools.name: get_cost_comparison
tools.description: Compare costs across models for a given workload.

tools.name: suggest_savings
tools.description: Get personalized cost optimization suggestions.

tools.name: get_usage_trend
tools.description: Show spend trends and anomalies over time.

tools.name: check_promotions
tools.description: Check active provider promotions on the platform.

tools.name: platform_spend
tools.description: Get real spend data from the platform.

tools.name: platform_budget
tools.description: Get real budget status from the platform.

tools.name: route_via_platform
tools.description: Route LLM requests through the cost-optimized platform proxy.

tools.name: token_tachometer
tools.description: Real-time token velocity gauge with state tracking (IDLE→ACTIVE→HIGH_LOAD→REDLINE).

tools.name: agent_status
tools.description: View per-agent traffic light status (green/amber/red/blue).

tools.name: set_agent_status
tools.description: Manually set an agent's traffic light color and label.

tools.name: sync_ratings
tools.description: View/trigger anonymous rating sync to platform.
